target.name: Open File menu item
target.annotation_query: Open File menu item in the VLC Media menu
fallback_queries: Open File option in the VLC Media dropdown
Ctrl+O menu entry in the VLC Media menu

targets.query_text: Open File menu item in the VLC Media menu
targets.query_full: Where is Open File menu item in the VLC Media menu? Return its bounding box as {"bbox_2d": [x1, y1, x2, y2]} in 0-1000 relative coordinates.
